subject: fix(styling): use exact letter-spacing arbitrary values
body:
Replace tracking-tight/tracking-wider with exact pixel values
to match original inline letterSpacing properties precisely:
- tracking-tight → tracking-[-0.5px] (home.tsx SyncTone title)
- tracking-wider → tracking-[0.5px] (ALPHA badges)

tracking-tight is -0.02em (varies by font size) while the original
was a fixed -0.5px. tracking-wider is 0.05em which gives 0.45px
at 9px font size, not 0.5px. Arbitrary values are pixel-exact.

Tags: styling, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theming
Semver: patch
